# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.

Prevent server-side request forgery (SSRF).
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;

class LinkPreviewController extends Controller
{
    public function fetchPreview(Request $request)
    {
        $validator = Validator::make($request->all(), [
            'url' => 'required|url'
        ]);

        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Invalid URL'], 400);
        }

        $url = $request->input('url');

        if (!$this->isSafeUrl($url)) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Unsafe URL'], 400);
        }

        $preview = $this->getWebsitePreview($url);

        if ($preview === false) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Unable to fetch preview'], 500);
        }

        return response()->json(['preview' => $preview]);
    }

    private function isSafeUrl($url)
    {
        $parsedUrl = parse_url($url);
        if (!isset($parsedUrl['host'])) {
            return false;
        }

        $ip = gethostbyname($parsedUrl['host']);
        if (filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP, FILTER_FLAG_NO_PRIV_RANGE | FILTER_FLAG_NO_RES_RANGE) === false) {
            return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    private function getWebsitePreview($url)
    {
        $ch = curl_init();

        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_URL, $url);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_TIMEOUT, 10);

        $content = curl_exec($ch);
        $httpCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

        curl_close($ch);

        if ($httpCode !== 200) {
            return false;
        }

        return $this->extractPreviewData($content);
    }

    private function extractPreviewData($content)
    {
        preg_match('/<title>(.*?)<\/title>/', $content, $matches);
        $title = $matches[1] ?? 'No Title';

        preg_match('/<meta name="description" content="(.*?)"/', $content, $matches);
        $description = $matches[1] ?? 'No Description';

        return [
            'title' => $title,
            'description' => $description
        ];
    }
}
